title: Include Subitem Updates in the Board's Update Feed
excerpt:
Hello! 
When we review the Updates feed within a board, we’d really like to be able to view updates to our sub-items as well, not just main items.  We’re currently unable to catch up on all recent changes to the board/pr…

posts.author: amreynolds (Amanda Reynolds)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

When we review the Updates feed within a board, we’d really like to be able to view updates to our sub-items as well, not just main items. We’re currently unable to catch up on all recent changes to the board/project from one place, we need to open up sub-items to review if there have been new posts.

image583×324 25.2 KB

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @amreynolds

I got just the perfect solution for that! Try this automation from the Subitem Automations app →

image2196×632 29.9 KB

Works exactly as you described!

If you also want to sync updates between multiple boards, that’s possible with the Connected Boards Automations app →

image2300×672 33.3 KB

All of our apps have free plans available so feel free to play around with them and test the automations to see if they fit your workflow. If you need anything or have some questions, email us anytime at hello@fantasymedia.io or kevin@fantasymedia.io

Hope this helps!

posts.author: larlhal (Leanne Larlham)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree with this feature request. I often accidentally change data in my sub-items, and then cannot see what the original data was, because it’s not listed in the activity log.
